wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero targets were hit despite a strong trending_up regime with Nifty +2.0%, indicating the system failed to capitalize on broad market momentum.
losses_analysis: One SL hit generating ₹-998.35 loss. The trade was likely entered against a tight stop or in a stock that didn't participate in the broad rally. With AI unavailable and zone score fallback active, trade quality was degraded — entries lacked probability filtering. The executed trades appear to be from prior pending orders rather than today's AI-driven recommendations (0 recommendations generated today).
regime_impact: Strong trending_up regime (ADX 25, Nifty +2.0%, VIX 11.8) should have been highly favorable for BUY setups. The system hurt itself by not generating any new AI recommendations and relying on stale/fallback orders that weren't aligned with today's momentum. Strategy type that fit best: trend-following BUY on high-beta names riding the broad rally.

improvements.action: Do not execute pending orders when AI is unavailable — require AI confirmation before any order fills, or cancel all pending orders when AI module is down
improvements.reason: Today 2 orders executed without any AI recommendation backing them, resulting in unfiltered low-quality trades during a day that should have been profitable

improvements.action: When AI is unavailable on trending_up days (ADX>22, Nifty>+1%), use a simplified momentum filter: only allow BUY orders on stocks outperforming Nifty on prior day with volume >1.5x average
improvements.reason: The fallback zone-score system placed trades that didn't align with the strong uptrend — a simple momentum proxy would have selected better candidates

improvements.action: Widen SL to at least 1.5% on trending days with VIX<13 instead of the ~0.8% SL used on the losing trade, to avoid noise-driven stops during intraday pullbacks
improvements.reason: The SL hit on a +2% Nifty day suggests the stop was too tight for normal intraday volatility — likely shaken out before price resumed upward

improvements.action: For WIPRO open position: trail SL to ₹173.50 if price opens above ₹175.50 tomorrow; exit at market open if Nifty gaps down >0.5%

improvements.reason: On a +2% Nifty day, high-beta stocks likely moved +3-4% — selecting these would have maximized trend-following alpha instead of trading a low-beta IT stock
